## Obsidian Integration Plan for Claude Code

### Metadata

- **Scope**: Standalone integration — independent of other projects
- **Target**: Linux (Ubuntu), `/home/crab`, Framework v3.0.0
- **Touchpoints**: `/wrap-up` skill, `session_end.py` hook, `mcp.json`, `settings.json`

---

### 1. Prerequisites & Installation

```bash
mkdir -p ~/Applications
wget -O ~/Applications/Obsidian.AppImage "https://github.com/obsidianmd/obsidian-releases/releases/download/v1.12.6/Obsidian-1.12.6.AppImage"
chmod
